nasb.text: “If a man is caught kidnapping any of his countrymen of the sons of Israel, and he deals with him violently or sells him, then that thief shall die; so you shall purge the evil from among you.

esv.text: “If a man is found stealing one of his brothers of the people of Israel, and if he treats him as a slave or sells him, then that thief shall die. So you shall purge the evil from your midst.

cnv.text: “如果發現有人拐帶了以色列人的一個兄弟，把他當作奴隸看待，或是把他賣了，那拐帶人的就要處死；這樣，你就把那惡從你中間除掉。

ccb.text: “如果有人绑架自己的同胞，奴役他或卖掉他，必须处死绑架者，除掉你们中间的罪恶。
